HOME.HERO_SUBTITLE: Interactive decision support system evaluating urban accessibility. Discover which areas have access to essential services within a 15-minute walking distance.
HOME.FEAT_2: Senior mode for adjusted walking speeds

ABOUT.TITLE: About Us
ABOUT.SUBTITLE: Ismailia 15
ABOUT.TEXT: "Ismailia 15" is a cutting-edge digital platform dedicated to transforming Ismailia's District 2 into a sustainable, human-centric community. By implementing the global 15-Minute City model, we aim to ensure that residents in El Salam, El Araisheya, and Mansheyet El Shohadaa can access all essential daily functions (including healthcare, education, food, and leisure) within a 15-minute walk or cycle. The platform strives to reduce car dependency, lower carbon emissions, and mitigate unplanned urban sprawl, enhancing the overall quality of life in alignment with Egypt Vision 2030.
ABOUT.GOAL_1_DESC: Promoting walkable neighborhoods and cycling infrastructure
ABOUT.GOAL_2_DESC: Building sustainable communities for a greener future
ABOUT.GOAL_3_DESC: Data-driven decisions to combat unplanned urban sprawl

MAP.AI_DESC_SENIOR: Senior-focused gap: ~{{gap}}% under target for {{service}} in {{zone}}. One well-placed site could lift coverage toward ~{{target}}% and reach ~{{served}} older adults (zone population {{pop}}).
MAP.AI_DESC_NORMAL: Service gap ~{{gap}}% vs benchmark for {{service}} in {{zone}}. A new facility could move coverage toward ~{{target}}% and benefit ~{{served}} people (zone population {{pop}}).

CONTRIBUTE.VS_FIX_BODY: Contribute: share where a service is needed (or exists) so others can see it on this community list. It does not change official map statistics. Fix My City: report accessibility problems with a photo — those are separate issue reports.
CONTRIBUTE.OPEN_MAP_FIX: Open the map — Fix My City
CONTRIBUTE.MAP_PICK_HINT: Three ways to set coordinates (you can combine them):
CONTRIBUTE.LOC_STEP_CENTER: District center — a fixed reference point in the model area (Ismailia District 2). Quick start; then drag accuracy by clicking the map.
CONTRIBUTE.LOC_STEP_GPS: My location — the browser asks for permission and drops the pin near your device. Use when you are standing at the facility.
CONTRIBUTE.LOC_STEP_MAP: Map click — click the map to place or move the pin (usually the most precise for a building or corner).
CONTRIBUTE.GEO_UNSUPPORTED: Geolocation is not supported in this browser.
CONTRIBUTE.GEO_WAIT: Locating… allow location if the browser asks.
CONTRIBUTE.GEO_DENIED: Could not get location. Pick a point on the map instead.
CONTRIBUTE.TITLE: Contribute to Data Updates
CONTRIBUTE.SUBTITLE: Help us keep data alive and fresh by adding new services
CONTRIBUTE.HERO_TEXT: Share information about services in your area to help improve the platform.
CONTRIBUTE.FORM_SUBTITLE: Fill the form below. Your note appears immediately in the community list on this page.
CONTRIBUTE.LOCATION_DESC: Select location on map or use GPS
CONTRIBUTE.SUCCESS_DESC: Thank you — your note is now visible in the community list on this page.
